Package com.rhlowery.acs.resource

Class CatalogResource

java.lang.Object
com.rhlowery.acs.resource.CatalogResource
@ApplicationScoped @Path("/api/catalog") @Produces("application/json") @Consumes("application/json") public class CatalogResource extends Object
REST resource for interacting with data catalogs. Provides endpoints for node traversal, permission checks, and policy application.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Retrieves child nodes for a specific path within a catalog.

  • Method Details

    • getNodes

      @GET @Path("/{catalogId}/nodes") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getNodes(@PathParam("catalogId") String catalogId, @QueryParam("path") String path)
      Retrieves child nodes for a specific path within a catalog.
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      path - The resource path
      Returns:
      Response containing a list of child nodes

    • verifyNode

      @GET @Path("/{catalogId}/nodes/verify") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response verifyNode(@PathParam("catalogId") String catalogId, @QueryParam("path") String path)
      Verifies the existence and accessibility of a catalog node.
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      path - The resource path
      Returns:
      Response 200 if verified, 404 otherwise

    • applyPolicy

      @POST @Path("/{catalogId}/nodes/policy") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response applyPolicy(@PathParam("catalogId") String catalogId, PolicyRequest request)
      Orchestrates the application of a security policy to a catalog resource. 
       
 @startuml
 start
 :Receive PolicyRequest;
 :Extract parameters;
 :Identify Service Provider;
 if (Provider Found?) then (yes)
   :Apply Policy to Provider;
   :Return 202 Accepted;
 else (no)
   :Return 404 Not Found;
 endif
 stop
 @enduml
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      request - The policy details (path, action, principal)
      Returns:
      Response 202 if accepted

    • getPermissions

      @GET @Path("/{catalogId}/nodes/permissions") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getPermissions(@PathParam("catalogId") String catalogId, @QueryParam("path") String path, @QueryParam("principal") String principal)
      Retrieves effective permissions for a user on a resource.
      Parameters:
      catalogId - Unique identifier of the catalog
      path - The resource path
      principal - The user or group identifier
      Returns:
      Response containing effective permissions

    • searchCatalog

      @GET @Path("/search") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response searchCatalog(@QueryParam("q") String q, @QueryParam("query") String query)
      Simple search endpoint across all registered catalogs.
      Parameters:
      q - Short query string
      query - Full query string
      Returns:
      Response containing search results

    • listProviders

      @GET @Path("/providers") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response listProviders()
      Lists all available catalog provider configurations.
      Returns:
      Response containing provider list
